tool_args.label: M23 AM bus speeds
tool_args.raw_text: This map shows the M23 bus route in the morning (AM) from West 23 Street to East 20 Street. The route is color-coded by speed: yellow (6-8 MPH) from West 23 Street to Madison Square Park, orange (4-6 MPH) from Madison Square Park to East 23 Street, red (< 4 MPH) from East 23 Street to 1 Avenue, and green (> 8 MPH) from 1 Avenue to East 20 Street.

payload.claim_text: M23 bus speeds vary by segment in AM: West 23 Street to Madison Square Park 6-8 MPH, Madison Square Park to East 23 Street 4-6 MPH, East 23 Street to 1 Avenue < 4 MPH, 1 Avenue to East 20 Street > 8 MPH
payload.subject: M23 bus speeds AM

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.

tool_args.label: M23 PM bus speeds
tool_args.raw_text: This map shows the M23 bus route in the evening (PM) from West 23 Street to East 20 Street. The route is color-coded by speed: yellow (6-8 MPH) from West 23 Street to Madison Square Park, orange (4-6 MPH) from Madison Square Park to East 23 Street, red (< 4 MPH) from East 23 Street to 1 Avenue, and green (> 8 MPH) from 1 Avenue to East 20 Street.

payload.claim_text: M23 bus speeds vary by segment in PM: West 23 Street to Madison Square Park 6-8 MPH, Madison Square Park to East 23 Street 4-6 MPH, East 23 Street to 1 Avenue < 4 MPH, 1 Avenue to East 20 Street > 8 MPH

tool_args.label: Parking changes 10th Ave to 9th Ave
tool_args.raw_text: Changes to Parking – 10 th Ave to 9 th Ave Add off-peak 10a-4p commercial loading Change 8a-6p No Parking to No Standing 7-10a, 4-7p Remove 8a-6p No Parking Restriction Add commercial loading zone

payload.description: Add off-peak 10a-4p commercial loading. Change 8a-6p No Parking to No Standing 7-10a, 4-7p. Remove 8a-6p No Parking Restriction. Add commercial loading zone.

tool_args.label: Parking changes 9th Ave to 8th Ave
tool_args.raw_text: Changes to Parking – 9 th Ave to 8 th Ave Add No Standing 7-10a, 4-7p to existing metered parking Change No Parking to metered commercial loading

tool_args.label: Parking changes 8th Ave to 7th Ave
